transcript.text:
Teumsae Ramyun
[Just be simple]
[And order everything on the menu]
1 of each, please
[Let's make it simple and eat Ramyun noodles]
[And as for portions...]
[About this much?]
[Teumsae Ramyun]
[Just 6 bowls..?!]
[Annihilated]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Icheon today
I was wondering what to eat and got a sudden craving for spicy food
I'm going to eat Teumsae Ramyun since they are known to be very spicy
I've arrived Teumsae Ramyun
[Teumsae Ramyun Noodles located in Icheon]

As for the menu... Red Egg Rice Cake
Egg Rice Cake
Red Sausage Stew Red Seafood Rice Cake
[Also add toppings]
How spicy is Red Egg Rice Cake?
About 5 times spicier than Shin Ramyun
[I can eat 5 times the amount, not spicy level]
I'll take a regular flavored Red Egg Rice Cake
Another one but spicier
1 Egg Rice Cake, 1 Red Sausage Stew, 1 Red Seafood Rice Cake, 1 Cold Ramyun
Just 1 of each, please
And also an order of spam riceball, please
[She can just feel its presence]
Just ask her for a photo
Can I please get a photo with you? Yes yes
[Thank you, boss]

Goodbye
[Present for Tzuyang]
You didn't have to
Thank you [Summer Santa]
Oh my
Beverages
With ice cup
[Adding in ice here too!]
[Ready to be served~!]
Which one is this?
Red Sausage Stew, Red Seafood Rice Cake
Egg Rice Cake
Red Egg Rice Cake (regular)
Cold Ramyun
Where do I start?
This is the spiciest one

This one's regular spicy
Let's try the regular one first
Look at the egg pop
Bon appetit
It's spicy
It stings like this (zzzzing) Over here
Perfect for hangovers
Delicious
Let's try the soup
I'm scared
Not as spicy as I thought it'd be
It's a good kind of spicy
It doesn't seem to linger
I might be wrong
There are bean sprouts in here
Bean sprouts

It's really refreshing
Which one next?
Seafood or Sausage?
Seafood first
It's Jjampong flavor
Rice cake in here
It's less spicy than this one
This one is spicy for sure
[And that's a 'regular' spicy]
It's tasty
I can taste Jjampong
There are 2 different types of spiciness
1 that builds stress
And 1 that washes away stress
This takes all the stress away
Starting with the broth

Little bit of tears, Face heating up,
Body sweating
It feels nice
Egg
I'm scared of this spicy bowl
Let's eat the egg one because my mouth is burning up right now
As for the color,
It looks like a non-spicy jjampong soup, like brownish
That's good!
The soup is really flavorful
This is tasty
It's like a mix of Ramen and Ramyun
This is yummy
Really savory
Red Sausage Stew this time
This right here..

Tears coming down
[Tissue?]
[Over here]
Even I shed a tear when I eat it
[Even the owner can't take the spice]
This is the best seat because of the tissue dispenser
How are you eating 6 bowls of Ramyun and 1 plate of rice balls?
You know people throw up after?
[She thought all mukbangers throw up after]
How many stomachs do you have?
Are you a cow?!
Are you an ox? (zodiac sign)
I'm actually an Ox And also a Taurus
Maybe I do have multiple stomachs
Sausage stew is really delicious
It tastes just like Military Stew

[Like the one from Uijeongbu]
Everything is numbing my tongue except for this one
Now for the spicy one
Red Egg Rice Cake Spicy level
I wonder how spicy it is because the regular one was very spicy
Let me cool down a little with this rice ball
It's really tasty
Now for the spicy one
I'm scared
Thank you
This must mean that I will cry for sure
I only ate the noodles!!!
[It's not getting better]
[White flag]
[I saw the future]
Wow this is no joke

It comes right away
It hits you right away
I need to save this
[Missing my mom all of a sudden]
I have to cool down with cold ramyun
It's been a while since I had this
I had it from somewhere
That's delicious
It's really cool
It's like Naengmyun
It's better than
the cold ramyun I had before
She's so good at eating
And
She's so pretty in person
Thank you

When you pulled down the mask, I said you were very pretty
And my son searched you up and showed me
Thank you
Please include this part in the video
This is just what I like
It's so good
Next
This one is too scary I'm going to eat it last
Rice cake, yay
Lots of rice cake and spam
Looks so good
This one is spicy too actually
It's refreshing
The soup is nice because of ground chili peppers
It's very good!
[Rice cake, not pickled radish]

Sausage stew tastes so good
I think this is #1 as for taste
This rice ball full of sesame oil
6 bowls are not enough to fill me up
Egg rice cake
[Plum juice fuel]
If it's too spicy, I would want to stop eating
But this one keeps going in
Did I finish it all?
Wow, that's freakin nuts
[Now for this guy]
I'm scared!
The soup is very red Do you see this?
This color is from hell
[Silent cry]
[But she's doing so well!]

Ground chili peppers
It's in powder
so the spiciness feels very thick
It doesn't have a bad smell though
Let's put this here
Cold Ramyun as a palate cleanser
This is more like Naengmyun than Ramyun
Wrap it with radish kimchi
[Last rice ball!]
[Finish it up with some soup]
This broth is yummy
I was craving some spicy food, so I came to eat spicy Ramyun
It was great because it feels like all of my stress is gone now
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
